one_time_description: Subsequent to year-end, settlements with Government of Canada: $570,000,000 land claim and approximately $118,802,000 agricultural claim
economic_notes: Nation operates Saskatchewan River Business Corporation (SRBC) and Cumberland House Saskatchewan River Limited Partnership (CHSRLP) as government business enterprises under modified equity method. CHSRLP operates Chief's Island Community Store selling fuel and supplies. Combined GBE revenue $4,623,192, net income $391,778. Subsequent to year-end received $688.8M in land and agricultural claim settlements; paid members $50,000 each totaling ~$64.8M; paid off ~$9.1M in loans; retained ~$26.71M for debt repayment and legal fees (~$2.5M); $68.192M placed in trust.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Major subsequent event: $688.8M settlement with Government of Canada on land and agricultural claims received after year-end — not recorded in these statements. Nation has covenant breaches on $3,836,007 of loans reclassified as current. Specific Claims loan of $2,731,762 from Government of Canada is non-interest bearing. Restricted cash includes $7,721,660 capital projects and $1,712,976 CMHC reserves. Two GBEs accounted for under modified equity method (SRBC and CHSRLP). Seven entities fully consolidated including partnerships and subsidiaries. Prior year had large one-time item: Purchase price in excess of identifiable assets $(2,297,697) and Gain on disposal $211,870.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
